commands.title: Test for SQL Injection
commands.note: Automatically detects and tests SQL injection.

commands.title: Specify Parameter to Test
commands.note: Only tests the `id` parameter.

commands.title: GET Parameter Injection
commands.note: Used for GET-based injections.

commands.title: POST Parameter Injection
commands.note: Used for POST-based SQLi testing.

commands.title: Dump All Databases
commands.note: Lists all databases on the server.

commands.title: Dump All Tables from a Database
commands.note: Lists all tables from the selected database.

commands.title: Dump All Data from a Table
commands.note: Extracts all data from the 'users' table.

commands.title: Search for Columns Like Password
commands.note: Searches all tables for columns named 'password'.

commands.title: Extract Specific Columns
commands.note: Dumps only the specified columns.

commands.title: Get SQL Shell
commands.note: Gives interactive SQL shell access.

commands.title: Get OS Command Shell
commands.note: Attempts to open OS command shell.

commands.title: Execute Specific OS Command
commands.note: Executes 'whoami' on the server.

commands.title: Meterpreter Shell (OS-Pwn)
commands.note: Attempts to spawn a Meterpreter session.

commands.title: Fingerprint Database System
commands.note: Detects backend DBMS type and version.

commands.title: Identify WAF
commands.note: Checks for presence of Web Application Firewall.

commands.title: Set Level and Risk
commands.note: Higher level and risk may test more parameters.

commands.title: Use TOR Proxy
commands.note: Routes traffic through TOR network.

commands.title: Use Custom User-Agent
commands.note: Bypasses user-agent filtering.

commands.title: Use Cookie-Based Authentication
commands.note: SQLi testing with authenticated session.

commands.title: Bypass CSRF Token with --csrf-token
commands.note: Handles CSRF-protected forms.
